name: momi-animation-backend
comment: Runs on Node 24 in production (pm2). better-sqlite3 is a native module built for that ABI; if you change the Node major version, run `pnpm rebuild better-sqlite3` or the native binding will fail to load (ERR_DLOPEN_FAILED / NODE_MODULE_VERSION mismatch).

scripts.test: tsx --test src/projectMetadataService.test.ts src/resultMoveService.test.ts src/runpodInputUrlService.test.ts src/runpodDebugLogger.test.ts src/runpodActivityTracker.test.ts src/runpodComfyService.test.ts src/runpodService.test.ts src/runpodVideoPreprocessService.test.ts src/seedancePromptWorkflowService.test.ts src/klingPromptWorkflowService.test.ts src/serverlessArtifactService.test.ts src/mediaResolutionService.test.ts src/creditTrackerSyncService.test.ts src/creditUsageAccounting.test.ts src/storageService.test.ts src/sqliteJobStore.test.ts src/exportSqliteJobStore.test.ts src/workflowService.test.ts src/jobQueue.test.ts src/jobQueueSqlite.integration.test.ts src/jobQueueRowLevel.integration.test.ts src/creditEstimator.test.ts src/podStatusService.test.ts
